_meta.source: Synthesis of TCS/Infosys/Wipro FY26 layoffs, BLS automation studies, McKinsey GenAI exposure index, AmbitionBox role exposure 2025-26, and qualitative industry signal (Livspace designer cuts, banking QA replacement cases).
_meta.ai_replaceability: 0 = AI cannot replace this in 5 years; 100 = role is being automated away now
_meta.layoff_impact: 0 = role unaffected by current wave; 100 = role is among hardest hit

upskill_path.Engineer (IC): Tools to master: Cursor or Claude Code (3-5x velocity on coding), v0 / Lovable for prototyping. Focus split: 50% AI-augmented coding (use it daily), 30% system design + architecture (AI is weak here), 20% deep domain knowledge (fintech, healthtech, etc). Junior code-writing is being commoditised — stop treating typing speed as the skill.
upskill_path.Engineering Manager: Tools to master: GitHub Copilot for code review, Linear / Notion AI for status work, Loom for async. Focus split: 50% engineering craft (you need to know the AI tools your team uses), 30% business strategy and stakeholder work, only 20% traditional people management. Status updates, 1:1 prep, and review summaries are being automated — your value is now technical judgment + business context.
upskill_path.DevOps / SRE: Tools to master: Datadog AI / PagerDuty AIOps for incident response, Kubernetes + Crossplane / Pulumi, KServe / BentoML for ML serving. Focus split: 40% platform engineering (build the AI tools the company uses), 30% ML infrastructure, 30% reliability and security. The 'ops' part is fading — 'platform' is the new craft.
upskill_path.QA: Tools to master: Playwright + LLM-driven test generation (Claude / GPT-4 writing test cases), k6 / Locust for performance, OWASP ZAP / Burp for security, TestRigor for AI-driven exploratory testing. Focus split: 40% test architecture, 30% performance + security testing, 30% AI-augmented exploratory testing. Manual regression is fully automated — stop doing it. Move toward the test cases AI can't write.
upskill_path.Data Scientist: Tools to master: DataRobot / H2O AutoML (know what AI handles vs what it doesn't), DoWhy / EconML for causal inference, Snowflake Cortex AI, MLflow / W&B for ML systems. Focus split: 40% causal inference + decision science, 30% ML systems and deployment, 30% deep domain expertise. AutoML eats junior model-building — senior judgment and business context survives.
upskill_path.Product Manager: Tools to master: Claude / Cursor for AI-prototype-led discovery, Figma AI for mockups, Otter / Granola for customer interviews. Focus split: 50% stakeholder navigation and customer judgment (AI is weakest here), 30% AI-augmented discovery (briefing AI well is the new craft), 20% PRD writing + roadmap (AI drafts these now). The job changed from 'document writer' to 'judgment-call maker'.
upskill_path.Project / Program Manager: Tools to master: Linear AI / Asana AI for status work, Otter / Fireflies for meeting transcripts, Notion AI for documentation. Learn Prosci or Kotter change management formally. Focus split: 50% transformation + change management, 30% AI implementation oversight, only 20% project tracking (this is being fully automated). Status updates and standups are over — strategy and people-through-change is what survives.
upskill_path.Designer: Tools to master: Figma AI for design systems work, Midjourney / Krea for ideation velocity, Galileo / Uizard for UI generation, Cursor for code-aware design. Focus split: 50% design strategy and research (AI is weak here), 30% AI-augmented production (use it as a power tool), 20% craft fundamentals. Junior production work (mid-fi mockups, icons, illustrations) is gone — Figma + Midjourney do it in minutes. Move up the value chain.
upskill_path.Sales: Tools to master: Apollo.io / Clay for AI-driven prospecting, Gong for call intelligence, Lavender / Smartwriter for email automation, Outreach AI for sequence optimisation. Focus split: 70% relationships and consultative selling (AI can't build trust), 20% AI-driven scale (let AI do the volume work), 10% strategic account planning. SDR / cold-calling is being automated — move toward complex deals where judgment matters.
upskill_path.Marketing / Growth: Tools to master: Jasper / Claude / Copy.ai for content velocity, Midjourney / DALL-E 3 for visuals, HubSpot AI for orchestration, Mutiny for personalisation, Common Room for community intel. Focus split: 50% brand strategy and creative direction, 30% measurement and growth experimentation, 20% briefing AI for creative production. Content creation is AI's job — your job is to direct it. Learning to brief AI well is the new craft.
upskill_path.Customer Success: Tools to master: Intercom Fin / Gainsight AI for support, ChurnZero with AI, Pendo / Heap for product analytics, AI-implementation playbooks. Focus split: 60% strategic account work (the human relationships), 30% AI-tool enablement for clients (be the one who helps customers adopt AI in their workflows), 10% Tier-1 escalations. Tier-1 support is automated — your value is now consultative.
upskill_path.Business Ops: Tools to master: Hex AI / Mode for analytics with AI, Microsoft Copilot for routine reporting, Sigma / Looker for dashboards, dbt + AI for transformation work. Focus split: 50% business transformation and decision support, 30% AI implementation oversight (be the one who helps the org adopt AI), 20% strategic analytics (the questions AI can't answer alone). Routine reporting is automated — own the 'why' work.
